flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Williams Baptist University fell 31% between 2021 and 2024 (26.2% → 17.9%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Williams Baptist University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (593 → 478).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Williams Baptist University fell 19% between 2021 and 2024 (31.8% → 25.6%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Williams Baptist University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($18.6k → $21.1k).
